Blight, Hammer of the Scourge  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 47
DMG: 23 Dmg Bonus: 160
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +9 WIS: +9 INT: +9
SV DISEASE: +10
Effect: Scourge (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHM
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
Races
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2003 at 10:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789706941
43 posts
It'd be nice if they updated the Shaman equipment to include frogloks... I'm using it at the moment, and it works just fine. Got it for about 200pp too. I think I got a good deal...
▲ Page top
This is a great hammer
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 10:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756961840
49 posts
This is a great soloing hammer...In a group it's iffy, because you shouldn't really be meleeing too much there anyway, as a shaman.

The good thing about this hammer?

It's a disease based proc (most mobs have low resist to this plus shamans get a low mana cost debuff for it), and over 500 dmg in a period of around 2 mins. Granted you might not use all that 2 mins fully, but that's a lot of dmg still.

Shaman dots inheritantly stack with each other. This means if you use ANY other dot rather than Scourge your proc will stack.

Because shamans can pretty much max their str and dex (our general buffs + a self only line), the damage and proc on this is good.
-------------------
Granted there are better weapons out there, this is great for soloing for anyone who doesn't have access to the higher end gear.

Although 4k is too much for the common player and would be better spent on other stuff :) So, I guess the only real problem is the price for this weapon.
▲ Page top
Wow, just uber....
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 4:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776090635
28 posts
For comeing off a Dragon this thing sucks, but then again, no it sucks.
▲ Page top
RE: Wow, just uber....
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2003 at 5:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785385847
45 posts
You have to remember this loot is now almost 5 expansions old. When this came out it was rather nice, and was worthy of being dragon loot. I can 2 box Sev now, but during the Kunark Era when people were finally replacing thier Banded Armor (1pp an AC, heh) this was a decent raid size dragon. Think of when this came out before you mindlessly berate an item.

(combat) tag
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2002 at 11:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774843835
View User Forum
8 posts
Does any one know what the ()combat) after effect:scourge means? Wondering if this makes it stack with normal casted scourge. Don't go by the screen shot btw. In game it saye Scourge (combat).
▲ Page top
RE: (combat) tag
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 3:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768555942
2 posts
the (combat) after a listed effect means you have to be in combat for the effect to take place if would identify a random proc and not a clickable effect.

Ballon 60 druid
Bumil 51 warrior
▲ Page top
Procing
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361084045
15 posts
Was gifted with this fine hammer at level 28. I can verify by use that the proc begins at 30th level. The proc may be for 500+ but I only see 40 on the first shot and it seems slower than my 30/26x7 DOT. Ah well I am usually too impatient for the MOBs to drop due to the DOTs anyway and keep bashing on them. HEHE. Gonna keep this one for a LONG time! I even equip this when I am working up my trade skills thanks to the +9 Wis and +9 INT both there at the same time!
▲ Page top
It Rocks
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 1:53 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965800885
11 posts
I got it and is worth every cent for soloing ability, I go for wis items when grouping and raids but I solo with this (add in Alacity or Adrenaline Tap potion and I rock)
▲ Page top
Good Sham weapon
QuoteReply
# May 31 2001 at 7:58 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756838492
1 post
Not only does this have a good dam/delay ratio but it also procs a 500+ DoT. Granted in a group the extra wisdom in the off hand but should you be soloing that dot's gonna rock. It may even save you mana, group or not, if you plan to cast that DoT.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 12:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This item is WAY OVERPRICED, Char Guardian shield cost about 500pp to 700pp on EC tunnels - which gives u 9wis, and it leaves another hand open to carry a weapon, which u can add more wisdom with. Let face it Wis is the only stats that really counts for us healer classes
RE: Allo
